author: Chris Magee
content: After watching YouTube reviews from Jono at Only Scrans, and Gary Eats, we had to go check out This & That whilst on a trip to Band on the Wall. Wow it lived up to everything we hoped it would. The food was just incredible, and you just cannot complain on value for money. It's hard to believe that after visiting Manchester for over 30 years we'd never come across this gem, but we're now very glad we've found it. We'll be back for sure 😎👌
